commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper verdict: pass (sha=db66cc412a6934307e47647bd8671bff4af29f75); current checks are failing: checks-node-agentic-agents:FAILURE, checks-node-agentic-plugin-sdk:FAILURE
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the bundled MiniMax music provider to request streaming hex output, decode SSE/audio responses under an operation deadline, preserve JSON/url fallbacks, and add focused provider tests.

PR surface: Source +144, Tests +151. Total +295 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main still uses a single MiniMax music POST with output_format "url" and a 120000ms fallback, and the source PR supplies live after-fix proof that generation can complete beyond that old timeout window.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is exact-head CI and maintainer acceptance of the compatibility-sensitive provider default change, not a clear source repair for ClawSweeper to apply.

target.title: fix(minimax): stream music generation responses
